Interface UserCookiesREPO

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserCookiesTBL, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<UserCookiesTBL, Integer>
public interface UserCookiesREPO extends org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserCookiesTBL, Integer>
Spring Data JPA repository for UserCookiesTBL entities.

This repository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for user cookie/session records.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<UserCookiesTBL>
    findByUserloginidAndActive(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL, boolean active)
    Finds cookie records by user and active status.
    List<UserCookiesTBL>
    findByUserloginidAndDeviceinformationidAndSessionkeyAndActive(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL, DeviceInformationTBL device, String cookie, boolean active)
    Finds cookie records by user, device, session key, and active status.

    Methods inherited from interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository

    count, delete, deleteAll, deleteAll, deleteAllById, deleteById, existsById, findAll, findAllById, findById, save, saveAll

  • Method Details

    • findByUserloginidAndActive

      List<UserCookiesTBL> findByUserloginidAndActive(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL, boolean active)
      Finds cookie records by user and active status.
      Parameters:
      userLoginTBL - the user to search for
      active - the active status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching cookie records

    • findByUserloginidAndDeviceinformationidAndSessionkeyAndActive

      List<UserCookiesTBL> findByUserloginidAndDeviceinformationidAndSessionkeyAndActive(UserLoginTBL userLoginTBL, DeviceInformationTBL device, String cookie, boolean active)
      Finds cookie records by user, device, session key, and active status.
      Parameters:
      userLoginTBL - the user to search for
      device - the device information to match
      cookie - the session key to match
      active - the active status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching cookie records
